sections.paragraph:
Original: לשׁם

Transliteration: leshem

Phonetic: leh'-shem

BDB Definition:

  1. a precious stone
    1. a precious stone in the high priest's breast-plate
      1. probably jacinth or ligure

Origin: from an unused root of uncertain meaning

TWOT entry: 1130

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
